aboutMe.description: Specialized in building resilient backend architectures, low-level networking, and automation pipelines. My approach treats software like critical infrastructure: designed for maximum uptime, isolated from external failures, and optimized for resource-constrained environments. From designing custom protocol communications to developing enterprise management systems, I engineer digital solutions meant to endure.

projects.name: consorcio360
projects.description: a comprehensive property management system designed to streamline the administration of residential and commercial properties, offering features such as tenant management, maintenance scheduling, and financial reporting, built with angular and django.

projects.name: futbol-5-manager
projects.description: A web application designed to manage and organize amateur 5-a-side football leagues, providing features such as team registration, match scheduling, and real-time score updates, built with react and spring boot.

projects.name: Teko Pora fundation landing page
projects.description: Landing page for Teko Pora, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting indigenous communities in Argentina through education and sustainable development initiatives.

projects.name: portfolio-terminal
projects.description: Personal portfolio website designed to mimic a terminal interface, showcasing projects and skills in a unique and interactive way.

projects.name: crm.ycc.group
projects.description: A production CRM platform used at YCC to organize operational tasks, assign responsibilities, and track internal workflow execution in one centralized system.
